MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Set For Trial On Mar-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court announces it has received a request by phone to take the matter off-calendar since the matter has settled. A notice of settlement has not been filed at this time. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Allegiance Law and Jason Lundberg's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel is Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. If a settlement is effectuated, the matter can be taken off-calendar.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed judicial council order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Andrew Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR# 6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AC)

Defendant Nand Khadka'S Motion For An Order Setting The Independent Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Henni Zommer
Off Calendar Oct-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Bryan Stofferahn of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'meara LLP 510-540-4889 appeared for defendant Nand Khadka. No other appearance.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Nand Khadka'S Motion For An Order Setting The Independent Mental Examination Of Plaintiff Henni Zommer is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Noah Lebowitz, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

Please attach a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalanotti, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)
